texto: The body cannot take chronic terror
autor: it must defend itself by refusing to harbor the spirit that wants to soar through it and experience life to the fullest.
explicacao: Citação de it must defend itself by refusing to harbor the spirit that wants to soar through it and experience life to the fullest. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The body cannot take chronic terror” articula reflexao, carmen-aguirre, cannot em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
